code:
import io
import string

let line1 = match io.read_line() when Some(s) s when None "" end
let line2 = match io.read_line() when Some(s) s when None "" end

let a = string.split_whitespace(line1)
let b = string.split_whitespace(line2)

mut i = 0
let n = a.len()
while i < n
  let sa = match a.get(i) when Some(s) s when None "" end
  let sb = match b.get(i) when Some(s) s when None "" end
  let ia = match string.parse_int(sa) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
  let ib = match string.parse_int(sb) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
  let s = ia + ib
  println("#{ia}+#{ib}=#{s}")
  i = i + 1
end
